name: Network Share Enumeration
description: Detects enumeration of network shares across multiple hosts
query:
// Network Share Enumeration
// User enumerating shares on multiple hosts
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "smb" and (event_type = "share_access" or event_type = "share_enumeration")
group by username, source_ip
having count(distinct destination_ip) > 10
within 300 seconds
